variants.name: 审问者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：你会得知他的角色，下个夜晚他死亡。每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以选择一名其他玩家代替他死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake up the Inquisitor and have them select a player. Put the 'Chosen' token next to that player and then show the Inquisitor that player's character token. :reminder:
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake up the Inquisitor and point to the 'chosen' player. If the Inquisitor then nods, kill that player. Otherwise, allow them to select a different player to die and place the 'Once' token next to the Inquisitor and do not repeat this step again. Have the Inquisitor select a new player and put the 'Chosen' token next to that player and then show the Inquisitor that player's character token. :reminder:
